content:
# Recommendations — after iter-037 (closeout)

## Headline: leg DELIVERED; no in-loop prover work remains
- Closable in-cone scope is fully closed, axiom-clean, `SectionGradedRing.lean` sorry-free. The plan
  agent's no-dispatch was correct (mechanical: 0 ready sorries). Default action next iter = hold at
  merge / continue closeout consolidation.

## Do NOT re-assign (blocked, intentional)
- `QuotScheme.lean` 4 χ sorries (`hilbert_polynomial`, `quot_functor`, Grassmannian re-exports) — χ-semantic,
  need the cohomology leg this i=0 project does not hold. Deferred since iter-001; strategy-critic
  re-confirmed SOUND. Do NOT send a prover without a strategy-authorized cohomology scope.
- `RelativeSpec.lean` — out-of-cone.
- Downstream `sectionGradedModule_fg` / `hilbertPoly_of_sectionModule` — Serre-finiteness/χ nodes, no Lean
  decl, out-of-leg (blueprint pins only).

## Only path to re-open prover work
User opens cohomology scope via `USER_HINTS.md`, OR a genuine in-cone sorry surfaces. Otherwise hand off
to parent merge.

## Merge-time tasks (NOT in-loop, do NOT edit now)
- Blueprint-doctor broken refs/covers (Cohomology_FlatBaseChange 2 covers + 14 refs; Picard_GlueDescent 4;
  Picard_QuotScheme 13) — extraction artifacts on dormant out-of-cone chapters.
- ~16 leandag "unproved" pins (anon-instance/abstract-concept pins, sync over-strip) + 356 lean_aux
  unmatched nodes — pre-existing dormant/parent decls; 1-to-1 coverage reconciliation is parent-owned.
- Goal-label boundary: `thm:grassmannian_representable` (smooth-projective skeleton) vs the delivered
  substance `represents`; smooth/projective + `relative_spec_*` residue is parent-owned.

## Reusable patterns
No new patterns this iter (no Lean). Cumulative SNAP module/coherence recipes are in PROJECT_STATUS KB +
ARCHON_MEMORY + `task_results/AlgebraicJacobian-Picard-SectionGradedRing.md` — preserve through merge.
